mapper.select:
SELECT event_type as eventType, count(DISTINCT patient_unique_id) as count FROM clinical_event_derived
GROUP BY event_type

SELECT ce.clinical_event_id AS clinicalEventId, ce.event_type AS eventType, ce.patient_stable_id AS patientId, ce.cancer_study_identifier AS studyId, ce.start_date AS startDate, ce.stop_date AS stopDate, ced.`key` AS `key`, ced.value AS value FROM clinical_event ce LEFT JOIN ( SELECT clinical_event_id, `key`, value FROM clinical_event_data WHERE clinical_event_id IN ( SELECT clinical_event_id FROM clinical_event WHERE cancer_study_identifier = #{studyId} AND patient_stable_id = #{patientId} ) ) ced ON ce.clinical_event_id = ced.clinical_event_id WHERE ce.cancer_study_identifier = #{studyId} AND ce.patient_stable_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY ce.clinical_event_id ASC
